message.msgTxt: '{"total":5,"unread":5,"notifications":[{"id":"NOTIF-001","title":"Financial Aid certification overdue - 7 students at risk","time":"2025-03-08T06:00:00Z","timeLabel":"2 hours ago","severity":"critical","category":"Financial Aid","read":false},{"id":"NOTIF-002","title":"Add/Drop deadline passed - 3 pending requests need override","time":"2025-03-08T05:00:00Z","timeLabel":"3 hours ago","severity":"high","category":"Enrollment","read":false},{"id":"NOTIF-003","title":"FERPA training overdue for 12 faculty members","time":"2025-03-07T08:00:00Z","timeLabel":"1 day ago","severity":"high","category":"Compliance","read":false},{"id":"NOTIF-004","title":"Oracle Cloud sync errors - hold data not propagating","time":"2025-03-07T08:00:00Z","timeLabel":"1 day ago","severity":"medium","category":"Systems","read":false},{"id":"NOTIF-005","title":"Priya Nair thesis deadline: March 15 - 6 days remaining","time":"2025-03-06T08:00:00Z","timeLabel":"2 days ago","severity":"medium","category":"Graduation","read":false}]}'
